definitions: A shipping charge that includes all costs associated with the transportation of goods, from origin to destination, without additional surcharges.
A comprehensive freight rate that covers all expenses, such as base rate, fuel surcharges, terminal handling charges, and other ancillary costs.
examples: The quote for the international shipment was All-In Freight.
We prefer All-In Freight to avoid unexpected fees.
The carrier offered a competitive All-In Freight rate.
